title: RBAC Permissions
creator: Agent Buildprint
summary: A guarded Capability Buildprint for adding role-based access control with explicit roles, central permission checks, protected surfaces, and allow/deny proof.
promise: Gives coding agents a phased implementation contract for grafting RBAC into an existing app without scattering permission logic or faking authorization proof.
risks: Existing permission systems require an explicit migration decision
Bad defaults can expose protected actions
checks: Verify privileged allow and non-privileged deny paths
Write capability receipt with proof level and blockers

trustBadges.label: Guarded capability
trustBadges.detail: Uses phased host assessment, planning, implementation, verification, and receipt.

trustBadges.label: Locally verifiable
trustBadges.detail: Can prove allow and deny paths without external provider keys.

publicStatus.label: Dogfood draft
publicStatus.explanation: Ready for agent dogfooding against a compatible host app. Intended to reach fixture or runtime proof without external keys.

whatYouNeed: A compatible app with user identity
A role storage or derivation decision
Fixture users or test doubles for allow/deny proof

howToUse.title: Load the packet
howToUse.detail: Use the package manifest and read BUILDPRINT.md first.

howToUse.title: Plan and graft
howToUse.detail: Write .buildprint/capability-plan.md, then implement each phase in order.

howToUse.title: Verify honestly
howToUse.detail: Prove both allow and deny paths, then record the actual proof level in .buildprint/capability-receipt.md.

resultChecklist: Receipt records proof level and blockers
